text: A film of two halves: one extraordinary, one tedious. I am still glad I saw it.
Confident craft in service of a story not worth telling.
As exhausting as it is beautiful; ask me in a year.
It is the kind of film you forget while watching.
For a horror, almost too quiet, and that is its strength.
For a horror, almost too quiet, and that is its problem.
I cannot decide if it is brilliant or just stubborn.
A small film that earns every minute of its short runtime.
A long film that earns none of its minutes.
Worth a watch on a plane, nowhere else.
